steps.title: Identify coefficients
steps.content: For $x^2 - 24x - 8 = 0$, read off $a = 1$, $b = -24$. No need to solve or factor.

steps.title: Apply Vieta's sum shortcut
steps.content: Sum of solutions $= -b/a = -(-24)/1 = 24$. This shortcut uses the coefficient of $x$ directly, so there is no need to factor the quadratic or compute each root separately. That matches Choice D — 24.
